mapper.select: SELECT bp.*, b.nickname AS blogger_nickname, b.avatar AS blogger_avatar FROM blogger_plan bp LEFT JOIN blogger b ON bp.blogger_id = b.id WHERE bp.blogger_id = #{bloggerId} AND bp.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bp.sort_weight DESC, bp.id ASC

SELECT bp.*, b.nickname AS blogger_nickname, b.avatar AS blogger_avatar FROM blogger_plan bp LEFT JOIN blogger b ON bp.blogger_id = b.id WHERE bp.is_online = 1 AND bp.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY bp.sort_weight DESC, bp.id ASC
SELECT bp.*, b.nickname AS blogger_nickname, b.avatar AS blogger_avatar FROM blogger_plan bp LEFT JOIN blogger b ON bp.blogger_id = b.id WHERE bp.id = #{id} AND bp.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blogger_plan (blogger_id, title, cover_image, difficulty_level, target_audience, target_body_part, train_days, video_url, video_type, summary, detail_arrangement, is_online, sort_weight) VALUES (#{bloggerId}, #{title}, #{coverImage}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{targetAudience}, #{targetBodyPart}, #{trainDays}, #{videoUrl}, #{videoType}, #{summary}, #{detailArrangement}, #{isOnline}, #{sortWeight})
mapper.update: UPDATE blogger_plan SET title = #{title}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel}, target_audience = #{targetAudience}, target_body_part = #{targetBodyPart}, train_days = #{trainDays}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, video_type = #{videoType}, summary = #{summary}, detail_arrangement = #{detailArrangement}, is_online = #{isOnline}, sort_weight = #{sortWeight} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blogger_plan SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blogger_plan SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
